channel.title: xAI News
channel.description: xAI News — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: xAI — Creators of Grok, the AI Chatbot
item.description: xAI builds Grok, an AI chatbot with voice chat, image and video generation, real-time search, and advanced reasoning. Try Grok at grok.com.
